attr.title: Stardew Valley
attr.desc: Stardew Valley is an open-ended country-life RPG. This port runs the Windows Steam mainline build on supported Linux ARM handhelds.
attr.inst: Requires the Windows Steam version of Stardew Valley. Copy all game files into stardewvalleymainline/gamedata. Leave stardewvalleymainline/Mods empty for vanilla play, or add SMAPI mods there to launch through the bundled SMAPI loader automatically.
